sentences.target: On atteint la porte sans se lever.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɛ̃ la pɔʁt sɑ̃ sə ləve/

translations.fr: On atteint la porte sans se lever.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɛ̃ la pɔʁt sɑ̃ sə ləve/
translations.en: We reach the door without getting up.
translations.de: Wir erreichen die Tür, ohne aufzustehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不用起身就够到门。
translations.yue: 我哋唔使起身就夠到門。
translations.ru: Мы дотягиваемся до двери, не вставая.
translations.pt: Alcançamos a porta sem nos levantar.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi với tới cánh cửa mà không đứng dậy.
translations.ar: نصل إلى الباب دون أن ننهض.
translations.nl: We kunnen de deur bereiken zonder op te staan.
translations.uk: Ми дотягуємося до дверей, не встаючи.
translations.hi: हम बिना उठे दरवाजे तक पहुँचते हैं.
translations.el: Φτάνουμε μέχρι την πόρτα χωρίς να σηκωθούμε.
translations.nb: Vi rekker døren uten å reise oss.
translations.sv: Vi når dörren utan att resa oss.
translations.ro: Ajungem la ușă fără să ne ridicăm.
translations.cs: Dosáhneme na dveře, aniž bychom vstali.
translations.da: Vi når døren uden at rejse os.
translations.ja: 立たずにドアに手が届く。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal subject pronoun; formally 3rd person singular, often used colloquially for 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with subject 'On' and takes a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'atteint'.
Preposition introducing a non-finite clause; marks absence of an accompanying action.
Clitic reflexive pronoun (3rd person), coreferential with the subject; part of the pronominal infinitive 'se lever'.
Infinitive verb; with 'se' forms the pronominal infinitive 'se lever' functioning as complement of 'sans'.

sentences.target: Tu atteins la gare avant midi.

translations.fr: Tu atteins la gare avant midi.
translations.en: You reach the station before noon.
translations.es: Llegas a la estación antes del mediodía.
translations.de: Du erreichst den Bahnhof vor Mittag.
translations.it: Arrivi alla stazione prima di mezzogiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在中午之前到达车站。
translations.yue: 你喺中午之前到達車站。
translations.ru: Ты добираешься до вокзала до полудня.
translations.pt: Você chega à estação antes do meio-dia.
translations.vi: Bạn đến nhà ga trước trưa.
translations.nl: Je bereikt het station vóór de middag.
translations.uk: Ти дістаєшся до вокзалу до полудня.
translations.hi: तुम दोपहर से पहले स्टेशन पहुँचते हो.
translations.el: Φτάνεις στον σταθμό πριν το μεσημέρι.
translations.nb: Du kommer til stasjonen før klokken tolv.
translations.id: Kamu tiba di stasiun sebelum pukul dua belas siang.
translations.sv: Du kommer till stationen före tolv.
translations.ro: Ajungi la gară înainte de prânz.
translations.da: Du kommer til stationen før klokken tolv.
translations.ja: あなたは正午前に駅に着く。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; agrees with 'Tu' and selects a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'gare'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'atteins'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun, masculine invariable; object of the preposition 'avant' (used bare, without article).

sentences.target: Je veux atteindre le quai avant dix heures.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø atɛ̃dʁ lə kɛ avɑ̃ diz œʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux atteindre le quai avant dix heures.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø atɛ̃dʁ lə kɛ avɑ̃ diz œʁ/
translations.en: I want to reach the platform before ten o’clock.
translations.es: Quiero llegar al andén antes de las diez.
translations.de: Ich will den Bahnsteig vor zehn Uhr erreichen.
translations.it: Voglio raggiungere il binario prima delle dieci.
translations.ko: 열 시 전에 승강장에 도착하고 싶다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我想在十点之前到达站台。
translations.yue: 我想喺十點前到達月台。
translations.ru: Я хочу добраться до платформы до десяти часов.
translations.pt: Quero chegar à plataforma antes das dez horas.
translations.he: אני רוצה להגיע לרציף לפני השעה עשר.
translations.tr: Saat ondan önce perona varmak istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn đến sân ga trước mười giờ.
translations.ar: أريد الوصول إلى الرصيف قبل الساعة العاشرة.
translations.nl: Ik wil het perron bereiken vóór tien uur.
translations.uk: Я хочу дістатися платформи до десятої години.
translations.hu: Szeretnék tíz óra előtt elérni a peront.
translations.hi: मैं दस बजे से पहले प्लेटफ़ॉर्म तक पहुँचना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę dotrzeć na peron przed dziesiątą.
translations.el: Θέλω να φτάσω στην αποβάθρα πριν από τις δέκα.
translations.nb: Jeg vil nå perrongen før klokken ti.
translations.id: Saya ingin tiba di peron sebelum pukul sepuluh.
translations.sv: Jag vill nå perrongen före klockan tio.
translations.ro: Vreau să ajung la peron înainte de ora zece.
translations.cs: Chci dorazit na nástupiště před desátou.
translations.da: Jeg vil nå perronen før klokken ti.
translations.ja: 十時前にホームに着きたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; modal-like verb selecting an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'veux' and head of the verb phrase that takes 'le quai' as its object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'quai'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'atteindre'.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures'; quantifies the time expression (liaison to following vowel often yields [diz]).
Common noun, feminine plural; head of the temporal NP governed by 'avant' ('avant dix heures' = 'before ten o'clock').

sentences.target: Ils atteignent le troisième étage sans ascenseur.
sentences.reading: /il zatɛɲ lə tʁwazjɛm etaʒ sɑ̃ asɔ̃sœʁ/

translations.fr: Ils atteignent le troisième étage sans ascenseur.
translations.ipa: /il zatɛɲ lə tʁwazjɛm etaʒ sɑ̃ asɔ̃sœʁ/
translations.en: They reach the third floor without an elevator.
translations.es: Llegan al tercer piso sin ascensor.
translations.de: Sie erreichen das dritte Stockwerk ohne Aufzug.
translations.it: Raggiungono il terzo piano senza ascensore.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们不用电梯就到达三楼。
translations.yue: 佢哋冇搭升降機就上到三樓。
translations.ru: Они поднимаются на третий этаж без лифта.
translations.pt: Eles chegam ao terceiro andar sem elevador.
translations.he: הם מגיעים לקומה השלישית בלי מעלית.
translations.vi: Họ lên tầng ba mà không dùng thang máy.
translations.ar: يصعدون إلى الطابق الثالث من دون مصعد.
translations.nl: Ze bereiken de derde verdieping zonder lift.
translations.uk: Вони дістаються на третій поверх без ліфта.
translations.hu: Felvonó nélkül eljutnak a harmadik emeletre.
translations.hi: वे बिना लिफ्ट के तीसरी मंज़िल तक पहुँचते हैं.
translations.pl: Docierają na trzecie piętro bez windy.
translations.el: Φτάνουν στον τρίτο όροφο χωρίς ασανσέρ.
translations.nb: De kommer seg til tredje etasje uten heis.
translations.id: Mereka mencapai lantai tiga tanpa lift.
translations.sv: De når tredje våningen utan hiss.
translations.ro: Ajung la etajul trei fără lift.
translations.cs: Dostanou se do třetího patra bez výtahu.
translations.da: De når tredje sal uden elevator.
translations.fi: He pääsevät kolmanteen kerrokseen ilman hissiä.
translations.ja: 彼らはエレベーターなしで三階に上がる.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed group).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils' and selects a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'étage'.
Ordinal adjective (NumType=Ord), masculine singular; modifies 'étage' and agrees in number/gender.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'atteignent'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase expressing absence of means.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sans'.
